commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=bae03b649c3f052d50adcf9abe46ce7d8b9d3479)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/plugins/plugin-metadata-snapshot.ts` so a non-empty installed-plugin index also scans source-root plugins and appends unindexed manifest records to the manifest registry.

PR surface: Source +33. Total +33 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main can reuse a non-empty persisted plugin index for validation/startup paths that do not include a newly added source-root memory plugin; I did not run the live Windows Gateway flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to choose the canonical fix shape between this PR and the sibling registry-boundary PR, and contributor-provided real behavior proof is still required.

target.title: fix(plugins): discover source-root plugins missing from installed index (gateway slot validation)
target.body:
Fixes #96046

## What Problem This Solves

When `InstalledPluginIndex` is non-empty (e.g. after `openclaw plugins install`), the Gateway loads plugins exclusively from the index. A plugin manually cloned into `extensions/` after the index was written is invisible to the Gateway, causing `plugins.slots.memory: plugin not found` even though `openclaw plugins list` shows it as present.

## Evidence

### Fix

`src/plugins/plugin-metadata-snapshot.ts`: when the index is non-empty, load the index-based registry, then additionally scan source roots via `discoverOpenClawPlugins()` and append any unindexed plugins.

### Terminal output

```
========================================
  PR #96076 — Source-Root Plugin Discovery
========================================
  Module: plugin-metadata-snapshot.ts ✅ loaded
  Fix:    source-root plugins merged when index is non-empty
  Status: PASS
========================================
```

### What was not tested

End-to-end with a real memory-slot plugin in extensions/. The merge reuses existing `loadPluginManifestRegistry` + `discoverOpenClawPlugins` — both covered by their own tests.

## Changes

1 file, +41/-8. Lockfile unchanged.
target.author: zw-xysk

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
